name: nrm
description: Use the right package manage - remove

options.name: -g
options.description: Operates in 'global' mode, so that packages are removed from the prefix folder instead of the current working directory

options.name: -D
options.description: Package will be removed from your `devDependencies`

options.name: --frozen
options.description: Don't generate a lockfile and fail if an update is needed
